name: Ice fall at work in Idaho, special rules?
description: Standard workers' comp; report uncleared ice.

mainEntity.name: Ice fall at work in Idaho, special rules?

acceptedAnswer.text: Standard workers' comp; report uncleared ice.
acceptedAnswer.description: Same comp rules; employer must mitigate known ice hazards, but no-fault coverage applies[14]. Key factors: Document uncleared walks. File within 1 year.
